name: Efficient and Privacy Aware Edge Cloud Collaborative Inference for Large Language Models

description: arXiv:2607.13093v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: On-device LLM inference faces a trilemma of response latency, limited hardware resources and user privacy. Full cloud inference delivers strong computing power but exposes user prompts and dialogue data, while standalone on-device inference is unfeasible for most consumer and embedded edge devices. This paper presents a privacy-centric e...
author: Chen Li, Jiexiong Liu, Yi Li
